qry:select.name: PARAMETROS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT O.c_empresa, L.c_liquidacion FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as L, ORG03_EMPRESAS as O WHERE L.oi_empresa = O.oi_empresa AND L.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql0
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT MAX(LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.e_secuencia) AS sec FROM LIQ19_EJECUCIONES WHERE LIQ19_EJECUCIONES.oi_liquidacion = {#PARA:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, max(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.e_secuencia) AS e_secuencia FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP WHERE LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo = LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_empresa} AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_liquidacion} AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.e_secuencia <= {#SECUENCIAS:@sec1} GROUP BY LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, max(LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.e_secuencia) AS e_secuencia FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP WHERE LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo = LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_empresa} AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_liquidacion} AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.e_secuencia <= {#SECUENCIAS:@sec2} GROUP BY LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION, ORG03_EMPRESAS, PER01_PERSONAL WHERE PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal = PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal AND LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp = PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion = LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.oi_empresa = LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa AND LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_liquidacion} AND ORG03_EMPRESAS.c_empresa = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_empresa} ORDER BY e_numero_legajo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql6
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totsret, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totnsret, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totasig, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totsac, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totigh, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totigd, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totdesc, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totcont, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totant, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totemb
FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION WHERE LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo = LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.e_secuencia = {#PARAM:@sec1} AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {#PARAM:@e_numero_legajo} AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_empresa} AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql7
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totsret, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totnsret, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totasig, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totsac, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totigh, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totigd, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totdesc, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totcont, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totant, LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.n_totemb FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION WHERE LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_liquidacion_ddo = LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion_ddo AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.oi_per_emp_ddo = LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo AND LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER.e_secuencia = {#PARAM:@sec2} AND LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo = {#PARAM:@e_numero_legajo} AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_empresa = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_empresa} AND LIQ99_LIQUIDACION.c_liquidacion = {#PARAMIN:DATOS/@c_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW
